creator: saper@system.pl
text:
New port of libsmi-0.1.8, a system management information
library. Includes few tools for MIB handling and 
a couple of IANA, IETF, IRTF and other MIB files.

This port is a prerequsite for gxsnmp, GNOME snmp package
and it is also used by a new development version
of tcpdump if anyone interested.
